parsed.explanation: The primary structural error was a syntax error in the opening tag of the <TITLE> element. The original text used a quotation mark instead of a closing angle bracket (<TITLE" instead of <TITLE>), which violates XML well-formedness rules. I have corrected this to a proper opening tag.
